title: S.O. 1296(E).—In exercise of powers conferred by section 9 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006), the Central Government, for the purposes of facilitating the promotion and development of micro, small and medium enterprises, specifies that the certificate issued on the Udyam Assist Platform to Informal Micro Enterprises shall be treated at par with Udyam Registration Certificate for the purpose of availing Priority Sector Lending benefits
description: S.O. 1296(E).—In exercise of powers conferred by section 9 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006), the Central Government, for the purposes of facilitating the promotion and development of micro, small and medium enterprises, specifies that the certificate issued on the Udyam Assist Platform to Informal Micro Enterprises shall be treated at par with Udyam Registration Certificate for the purpose of availing Priority Sector Lending benefits
text: 1824 GI/2023 (1) रजिस्ट्री सं. डी.एल.- 33004/99 REGD. No. D. L.-33004/99 xxxGIDHxxx xxxGIDExxx असाधारण EXTRAORDINARY भाग II—खण्ड 3—उप-खण्ड (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) प्र ाजधकार से प्र काजित PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY सूक्ष्म , लघु और मध्यम उद्यम मंत्रालय अजधसूचना नई ददल्ली , 20 माचच, 2023 का.आ. 1296(अ).—केन्द्रीय सरकार, सूक्ष्म , लघु और मध्यम उद्यम जिकास अजधजनयम, 2006 (2006 का 27) की धारा 9 द्व ारा प्र दत्त िजियों का प्र योग करते हु ए , सूक्ष्म , लघु और मध्यम उद्यम की प्र ोन्नजत और जिकास को सुकर बनाने के प्र योिनों के जलए जिजनर्ददष्ट करती है दक अनौपचाररक सूक्ष्म उद्यमों को उद्यम सहायता मंच पर िारी दकया गया प्र माण पत्र , प्र ाथजमकता क्षे त्र उधार फायदे प्र ाप्त करने के प्र योिन के जलए उद्यम रजिस्ट्रीकरण प्र माण पत्र के समकक्ष समझा िाएगा। [फा. सं. पीिाई 10024/12/2021 पी और िी. डीसीएमएसएमई] डा. रिनीि, अपर सजचि और जिकास आयुि सं. 1247] नई ददल्ली , सोमिार, माचच 20, 2023/फाल्गु न 29, 1944 No. 1247] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, MARCH 20, 2023/PHALGUNA 29, 1944 सी.जी.-डी.एल.-अ.-20032023-244492 CG-DL-E-20032023-244492 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th March, 2023 S.O. 1296(E).—In exercise of powers conferred by section 9 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006), the Central Government, for the purposes of facilitating the promotion and development of micro, small and medium enterprises, specifies that the certificate issued on the Udyam Assist Platform to Informal Micro Enterprises shall be treated at par with Udyam Registration Certificate for the purpose of availing Priority Sector Lending benefits. [F. No. PY-10024/12/2021-P and G-DCMSME] Dr. RAJNEESH, Addl. Secy. and Development Commissioner Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
